responses.reply: Hey there! 👋 I'm Aishwarya's AI assistant. I can tell you about her skills, projects, experience, or how to get in touch. What would you like to know?

Aishwarya's toolkit spans the full data pipeline:

📊 Data Analysis: Python, Pandas, NumPy, Excel
📈 Visualization: Tableau, Matplotlib, Seaborn
🤖 ML/AI: scikit-learn, Predictive Modelling, Feature Engineering
🗄️ Databases: SQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL
☁️ Cloud: AWS Fundamentals, Oracle OCI AI Foundations
🔧 Tools: Git, Jupyter, Google Colab, Postman

Here are Aishwarya's key data projects:

🔴 Churn & Retention Intelligence Engine — ML model predicting at-risk customers
🟠 Superstore Sales Analysis — Interactive Tableau BI dashboard
🟡 Deloitte Machine Downtime Dashboard — Tableau + Excel data viz simulation
🟢 Brain Tumor Detection — scikit-learn classification on medical imaging
🔵 Drought Prediction System — ML environmental forecasting
🟣 Promptly — AI caption generator using Gemini API

Want to explore any of these?

The Churn & Retention Intelligence Engine is one of Aishwarya's flagship ML projects. It uses behavioral and transaction data to predict which customers are likely to leave, and surfaces the key drivers behind churn so businesses can act proactively. Built with Python, Pandas, scikit-learn, and feature engineering techniques. 🔗 You can find it on her GitHub: github.com/Aishwaryagithubit/Churn-Retention-Intelligence-Engine
